name: Green Papaya Salad (Som Tam)
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Long beans, chopped into 1-inch (2.5 cm) lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the outer skin from the green papaya and finely shred the flesh on a cheese grater or chop very finely into long thin shreds. Set aside.
2. In a mortar, lightly pound the garlic, add the chilis, and lightly pound while occasionally stirring with a spoon to prevent the paste from thickening.
3. Add the long beans and slightly bruise them. Add the shredded papaya, lightly pound, and stir until all ingredients are blended together.
4. Add the lemon juice, soy sauce, and sugar, and stir into the mixture.
5. Finally, add the tomato and stir once.
6. Arrange the Chinese cabbage leaves on a serving dish and place the salad on top of them. Diners should tear off a section of cabbage leaf to use as a scoop for the salad, eating both together. This dish is especially good with sticky rice.
